title: Cynorkis nutans
taxonomy: Cynorkis nutans is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This orchid is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as the Democratic Republic of Congo, Tanzania, and Kenya. Cynorkis nutans is a terrestrial orchid, often found growing in woodland and grassland areas. It is a member of the subtribe Orchideae, within the orchid family. Further classification within the genus Cynorkis is not well-documented, but it is generally placed in the Cynorkis genus.
